a11y: Wrap in a <div role="group" aria-label="…"> to announce the grouping to screen readers.
Ensure each child button still has its own accessible label.
description: A joined row of buttons that share borders; grouped related actions. orientation.
name: button-group
notes: hover/focus/active states are CSS pseudo-classes, not props; disabled is the only state prop.
rationale: Mirrors the Figma `button-group-container` slot (Button group page, 699:1902): a row/column of <Button>s that read as one segmented control — inner radii are flattened and borders collapse into shared seams. Children are real <Button>s (single source of truth); this only handles the grouping geometry.
title: Button Group
